Uses of Class
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.ThreadRequirements

Packages that use ThreadRequirements 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.

  • Uses of ThreadRequirements in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return ThreadRequirements 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static ThreadRequirements ThreadRequirements.putContext​(String name, Object value)
    Adds or updates contextual information associated with the exception message.
    static ThreadRequirements ThreadRequirements.removeAllContext()
    Removes all contextual information associated with the exception message.
    static ThreadRequirements ThreadRequirements.removeContext​(String name)
    Removes contextual information associated with the exception message.
